items.title: Spurs draft pick Jayden Quaintance underwent a previously scheduled clean-up procedure on his oft-injured right knee Wednesday.
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
Spurs draft pick Jayden Quaintance underwent a previously scheduled clean-up procedure on his oft-injured right knee Wednesday.

The team provided no specific timetable for the rookie's return to basketball activities.

items.title: Carter Bryant will play sparingly at Summer League. Jayden Quaintance won't play at all. Tarris Reed Jr. is ready to flash his blue-collar credentials in a Spurs jersey.
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
Carter Bryant will play sparingly at Summer League. Jayden Quaintance won't play at all. Tarris Reed Jr. is ready to flash his blue-collar credentials in a Spurs jersey.

Those storylines and more to watch as the Spurs open Summer League today in San Francisco:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.description: Here are five storylines to watch as the Spurs begin Summer League play on Friday in San Francisco for the California Classic before heading to Las Vegas.

items.title: Jayden Quaintance will have to wait a bit before he gets on the court for the #Spurs, but that doesn’t mean the 20th overall pick can’t still learn a thing or two.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Jayden Quaintance will have to wait a bit before he gets on the court for the #Spurs, but that doesn’t mean the 20th overall pick can’t still learn a thing or two.

“He's engaged. He's here at every practice,” Corliss Williamson said.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Spurs reveal Summer League plans for top pick Jayden Quaintance
media.description: Selected 20th overall, the forward from Kentucky is nursing an ongoing knee issue and will travel but not play with the Spurs' Summer League squad.

items.title: Corliss Williamson said Jayden Quaintance (knee) will travel with the Summer League squad to San Francisco and Las Vegas but will not play:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Corliss Williamson said Jayden Quaintance (knee) will travel with the Summer League squad to San Francisco and Las Vegas but will not play:

"He's here at every practice. He's engaged. Good young man. I like his talent and look forward to seeing him for some years."

items.title: [Highlight] Jayden Quaintance said the Spurs cut him off from wearing 21: “As soon as I got drafted they were like “Here’s a couple number options that you’ll have.’ They killed that dream pretty fast”
items.author: WEMBY_F4N

items.title: Jayden Quaintance said Spurs continue to stress “their priority is to make me 100 percent healthy.”
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Jayden Quaintance said Spurs continue to stress “their priority is to make me 100 percent healthy.”

He also said he doesn’t know yet whether he’ll be able to participate in Summer League.

items.title: Brian Wright on Quaintance’s health: “He came in and visited, so our doctors have spent time with him.”
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt: Brian Wright on Quaintance’s health: “He came in and visited, so our doctors have spent time with him.”

items.title: Brian Wright said Spurs are comfortable w/ possibly taking a very long-term approach" w/ Quaintance.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Brian Wright said Spurs are comfortable w/ possibly taking a very long-term approach" w/ Quaintance. 

"He's got tremendous, tremendous talent and unfortunately that was cut short a little bit due to injury. But had it not been, maybe we don't have the opportunity to draft him."

items.title: While Jayden Quaintance recovers, the Spurs will have plenty to work with in Tarris Reed Jr.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
While Jayden Quaintance recovers, the Spurs will have plenty to work with in Tarris Reed Jr. 

The 22-year-old St. Louis native carries 260 pounds on his 6-foot-10 frame and has a 7'4.25 wingspan.

items.title: Quaintance combined for 90 stocks (63 blocks, 27 steals) in only 24 games in his injury-shortened freshman season at Arizona State in 2024-25.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Quaintance combined for 90 stocks (63 blocks, 27 steals) in only 24 games in his injury-shortened freshman season at Arizona State in 2024-25.

He was the only player in the nation to reach that  number in less than 25 games.

items.title: Quaintance on Spurs defense: “They like to switch a lot. I feel like I'm a very switchable defender. I feel like we are at multiple positions, so I feel like that's one thing that again will be able to make us stand out...I feel like I can do pretty much everything defensively.”
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt: Quaintance on Spurs defense: “They like to switch a lot. I feel like I'm a very switchable defender. I feel like we are at multiple positions, so I feel like that's one thing that again will be able to make us stand out...I feel like I can do pretty much everything defensively.”

items.title: If Quaintance is a redshirt, Reed makes sense. Spurs know the UConn staff really, really well, for what that’s worth.
items.author: Mike Finger
items.body_excerpt: If Quaintance is a redshirt, Reed makes sense. Spurs know the UConn staff really, really well, for what that’s worth.

items.title: Regarding his surgically repaired knee, Spurs draft pick Jayden Quaintance said he is "still in a little pain" and is facing "another surgery" to clean up his meniscus.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Regarding his surgically repaired knee, Spurs draft pick Jayden Quaintance said he is "still in a little pain" and is facing "another surgery" to clean up his meniscus. 

He did not have a date for the surgery. Asked if he expects to be ready for training camp, he said, "I'm not sure yet."

items.title: The fact that the San Antonio Spurs are taking both Jayden Quaintance and Tarris Reed Jr. suggest to me that Quaintance could be a rookie redshirt (see: Harry Giles III)
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: The fact that the San Antonio Spurs are taking both Jayden Quaintance and Tarris Reed Jr. suggest to me that Quaintance could be a rookie redshirt (see: Harry Giles III)

items.title: The Spurs taking Quaintance and Tarris Reed Jr. is interesting. I like both prospects a lot, but this is almost like a hedge because of Quaintance's injury concerns. Reed was among the best remaining options for the Celtics.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt: The Spurs taking Quaintance and Tarris Reed Jr. is interesting. I like both prospects a lot, but this is almost like a hedge because of Quaintance's injury concerns. Reed was among the best remaining options for the Celtics.

items.title: The caveat is Jayden Quaintance is still on the board. Health is the only question mark. Would be a bold pick, but he could wind up being a huge hit. All-Defensive potential and intriguing offensive tools.
